name: Requirements gathering
description: Collect and document all project requirements from stakeholders

name: Backend module
description: Develop core backend services and API endpoints

name: Frontend design
description: Design and implement the user interface components

name: Database integration
description: Set up database schema and integrate with backend services

name: UI testing
description: Perform end-to-end testing of the frontend components

name: System integration
description: Integrate all modules and perform final system validation
